case_title: FREDERICK O. LEWIS III VS. MELVIN MURPHY ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-17-2021 AT 1:30 P.M. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM IS GRANTED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$150.00) SERVED AUG-23-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YEUNG, LUCY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-17-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-20-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF FREDERICK O. LEWIS III IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MEL MURPHY IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT LUCY YEUNG IS PRESENT. THE COURT DISMISSES THE CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT LUCY YEUNG WITH PREJUDICE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $2123.83 (COSTS INCLUDED) TO THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT IS ALLOWED TO RETRIEVE THE ORIGINAL MICROWAVE (AS IS). APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE DEC-20-2021 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE OR THE AGREEMENT IS BROKEN. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$100.00) SERVED AUG-23-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MURPHY, MEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-20-2021 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-17-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF FREDERICK O. LEWIS III IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MELVIN MURPHY IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUCY YEUNG IS PRESENT. LUKE O'BRIEN SUBMITS A LETTER TO THE TO THE COURT FROM MR. MURPHY STATING THAT HE IS UNABLE TO APPEAR FOR TODAY'S MATTER DUE TO DEFENDANT'S ILLNESS AND REQUEST THE COURT TO ALLOW MR. O'BRIEN TO APPEAR ON HIS BEHALF. MR. MURPHY'S REQUEST IS DENIED. COURT DOES NOT ALLOW MR. O'BRIEN TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF MR. MURPHY. DEFENDANT MELVIN MURPHY IS ORDER TO APPEAR AT THE NEXT HEARING. MR. MURPHY IS TO PROVIDE PROOF OF ILLNES FOR NOT APPEARING FOR TODAY'S TRIAL. FOR MATTER WILL MOVE FORWARD WITH TRIAL WHETHER OR NOT DEFENDANT MELVIN MURPHY IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LEWIS III, FREDERICK O. AS TO DEFENDANT MURPHY, MEL YEUNG, LUCY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LUKE O'BRIEN, ASSOCIATE FILED BY DEFENDANT MURPHY, MEL
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT MURPHY, MEL AS TO PLAINTIFF LEWIS III, FREDERICK O.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARIMG BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT MURPHY, MEL
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
